# displaysDownloadsDirectoryControl

**Instance Property**

Specifies whether the downloads directory control should be displayed.

## Declaration

```swift
var displaysDownloadsDirectoryControl: Bool { get set }
```

## Configuring Download Interface and Downloading Files

- **canDownloadSelectedItems**: Returns whether the selected items can be downloaded
- **downloadsDirectory**: Specifies the directory where files are downloaded
- **downloadSelectedItems(_:)**: Deletes the selected items from the camera.
- **downloadAllItems(_:)**: Downloads all the items.
- **downloadSelectedControlLabel**: Allows the “Download Selected” control to be renamed.
- **downloadAllControlLabel**: Allows the “Download All” control to be renamed.
